installCommand: echo 'skip: 报告构建只读 .niceeval/ 与 reports/,不碰本仓库 node_modules'
buildCommand: mkdir -p /tmp/niceeval-build && cd /tmp/niceeval-build && npx -y -p niceeval@latest -p react -p react-dom -c 'niceeval view --results "$OLDPWD/.niceeval" --report "$OLDPWD/reports/memory.tsx" --out "$OLDPWD/site" --allow-sensitive-artifacts'
